_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: single-nuclear RNA sequencing was performed on 19,276 nuclei from Group 1 MPNSTs (n = 3) or Group 3 neurofibromas (n = 3) from patients with clinical diagnoses of NF-1
details: Successfully processed and analyzed 19,276 nuclei from Group 1 MPNSTs and Group 3 neurofibromas, identifying 18 cell clusters
